title: Hue, Thua Thien Hue — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hue, Thua Thien Hue: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hue is a city in Thua Thien Hue with a population of 350,000. Vietnam’s former imperial capital, home to the UNESCO-listed Citadel and royal tombs, offering a slower pace of life and very affordable living in a historically rich setting.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
